questions.statement: What is the theme of Human Rights Day 2025, observed on December 10?
Where has Prime Minister Narendra Modi inaugurated the 72nd National Volleyball Tournament in January 2026?
What is the theme of the National One Health Mission Assembly 2025?
options: One Earth, One Health, One Future /

questions.statement: Under which theme is the India Internet Governance Forum (IIGF) 2025 being organised in New Delhi on 27&ndash;28 November 2025?
options: Advancing Internet Governance for an Inclusive and Sustainable Viksit Bharat /
Digital Transformation for a New Economy /

questions.statement: Which pioneering Indian computer scientist, known for introducing the first B.Tech programme in Computer Science at IIT Kanpur and authoring over 20 textbooks on programming, recently passed away?
Which real estate company was conferred the &ldquo;Real Estate Developer of the Year&rdquo; award at the Times Business Awards-2026?
For how many consecutive times has the Union Finance Minister Smt. Nirmala Sitharaman presented the Union Budget in the Parliament on February 1, 2026?
How many Kalinga Safety Excellence Awards did Odisha Mining Corporation (OMC) secure for the Assessment Year 2024 at the 16th National Safety Conclave 2025?

Where did the Second World Summit for Social Development (WSSD-2) take place in November 2025, which was attended by Union Minister Dr. Mansukh Mandaviya to represent India&rsquo;s vision of inclusive and equitable growth?
With which organisation has the Housing and Urban Development Corporation Limited signed an MoU to jointly collaborate on strengthening urban infrastructure and sustainable urban development?
options: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs /
